summary: Fix dark mode padding in CardsGrid block by adding conditional section padding for tablet+ breakpoints. The current implementation attempts to use md:before:py-24 on a pseudo-element, which is invalid - padding properties don't apply to ::before pseudo-elements. The correct approach is to add md:py-24 (96px) to the section element itself when in dark mode.

rationale.problem: The spec requires 96px top/bottom padding in dark mode on tablets+. Currently the section has py-10 sm:py-16 (40px/64px), and the dark background pseudo-element extends -inset-8 (32px) beyond. The md:before:py-24 class is ineffective because CSS padding does not apply to pseudo-elements.
rationale.option1_analysis: Add md:py-24 to section when darkMode is true. This gives 96px section padding, and the pseudo-element extends 32px beyond that. Content-to-dark-bg-edge spacing becomes 96px, meeting the spec requirement.
rationale.option2_analysis: Increasing -inset value would make the dark background larger, but wouldn't increase the internal padding between content and the dark background edge. Would not meet the 96px requirement.
rationale.contentWithMedia_pattern: ContentWithMedia uses the same base padding (py-10 sm:py-16) but doesn't add extra dark mode padding. However, ContentWithMedia applies the pseudo-element to individual columns, not a full-width container. CardsGrid's full-width dark background requires different handling to achieve the desired 96px internal padding.

changes.description: Add md:py-24 to section when in dark mode, and remove ineffective md:before:py-24 from container
changes.currentCode:
<section
	{ ...useBlockProps( {
		className: cn( {
			'cards-grid py-10 sm:py-16': true,
			'dark bg-transparent!': attributes.darkMode,
		} ),
	} ) }
>
changes.newCode:
<section
	{ ...useBlockProps( {
		className: cn( {
			'cards-grid py-10 sm:py-16': true,
			'dark bg-transparent! md:py-24': attributes.darkMode,
		} ),
	} ) }
>

changes.description: Remove ineffective md:before:py-24 from container pseudo-element classes
changes.currentCode:
'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 md:before:py-24':
	attributes.darkMode,
changes.newCode:
'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8':
	attributes.darkMode,

changes.description: Add md:py-24 to section when in dark mode
Remove ineffective md:before:py-24 from container pseudo-element classes
changes.currentCode: [ 'container' => true, 'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 md:before:py-24' => $darkMode ]
changes.newCode: [ 'container' => true, 'relative before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8' => $darkMode ]

testing.visual_check: In dark mode, verify that on tablet+ (768px+) there is approximately 96px of vertical padding between the dark charcoal background edge and the content (header/grid).

breakpoints.expected_padding: 96px (md:py-24) in dark mode, 64px (sm:py-16) in light mode

testing.editor_sync: Verify both editor (TSX) and frontend (PHP) render with matching padding
